$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && (newData.child('matchmaking/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('players/host/uid').val() === auth.uid)) || (data.exists() && (data.child('matchmaking/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('matchmaking/guestUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players/host/uid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players/guest/uid').val() === auth.uid || (data.child('status').val() === 'waiting' && !data.child('players/guest').exists() && newData.child('players/guest/uid').val() === auth.uid))))

$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || (!newData.exists() && data.child('publicId').exists() && data.child('publicId').val() === root.child('rankings/global/' + auth.uid + '/publicId').val()))
